description: Tire tread depth below safe minimum or tread wear indicators are flush with surface
visual_signals: visible wear bars level with tread

description: Tire sidewall shows bulging, cracking, cuts, or exposed cord indicating structural failure risk
visual_signals: deep crack lines on tire side
fabric or cord visible through rubber

description: One or more required lights are broken, missing, or visibly non-functional on the vehicle
visual_signals: darkened light while others are illuminated

description: Windshield has cracks, chips, or shattering in the driver primary viewing area
Side mirror is cracked, missing, or visibly misaligned reducing driver rearward visibility
visual_signals: mirror angled away from usable position

description: Fluid leak visible under or around the vehicle indicating engine, transmission, or hydraulic failure
visual_signals: dripping fluid from hose or fitting
oily residue on pavement under vehicle

description: Body panel damage with sharp protruding edges creating laceration hazard for personnel
visual_signals: torn metal edge on fender or panel

description: Inspection sticker or registration decal is expired, missing, or illegible on the vehicle
visual_signals: empty space where sticker should be

description: Load securement is inadequate with loose straps, missing tie-downs, or shifting cargo visible
Required reflective conspicuity tape or markings are missing, damaged, or insufficient on trailer
visual_signals: gaps in reflective tape along trailer side
